description: Workload-ranked top-N API enablement wave plan from real workload blockers and support-matrix obligations.

scoring.formula: score = severity_weight * (1 + weighted_workload_impact + 0.5 * critical_symbol_mentions + trace_weight + debt_risk_weight)

wave_plan.title: Pthread lifecycle operations (create/join/detach)
success_criteria: target module symbols no longer classified as GlibcCallThrough/Stub in support_matrix
replacement guard emits zero forbidden call-throughs for symbols in this wave
fixture/gate artifacts updated with deterministic logs
